top_comments: We've seen similar results deploying WhatsApp automation for a retail chain in Bangalore. The hybrid model is key — 100% AI fails on edge cases.
The data points are compelling but I'd want to see methodology. Correlation between AI deployment and time savings doesn't establish causation.
Interesting take, but this oversimplifies the situation. The real challenge for Indian SMBs isn't awareness — it's implementation complexity and trust in new technology.
Interesting take, but this oversimplifies the situation. The real challenge for Indian SMBs isn't awareness — it's implementation complexity and trust in new technology.
